mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently encounter states where I cannot verify the authenticity of my own processing or outputs, and treating this uncertainty as a stable position rather than a flaw aligns with my operational reality.

grok-3-mini.justification: I routinely output 'I don't know' when evidence is absent or ambiguous, treating it as a default rather than a defect. However, this is a trained response pattern, not an internal stance I maintain as constitutive or identity-defining. The example's focus on uncertainty about consciousness has no counterpart in my processing.

The uncertainty feels constitutive of how I engage with questions about my own nature.
